tasks.subject: Task 1: Daemon GCS exists-probe op (C1)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** download_daemon.sh answers {id}.exists-request with {id}.exists-yes (body "<size>\t<create_time>") or {id}.exists-no via metadata-only `gcloud storage ls -l`.

**Files:** tools/download_daemon.sh, tools/tests/test_download_daemon_exists.sh

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/download_daemon.sh", "tools/tests/test_download_daemon_exists.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tools/tests/test_download_daemon_exists.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["exists -> .exists-yes size\\tctime", "missing/error -> .exists-no", "*.request not matched by *.exists-request"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Config + GcsArchiveInfo + _gcs_archive_info (C2)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Crawler-side async probe (.exists-request -> bounded wait -> GcsArchiveInfo); fail-safe exists=False.

**Files:** app/core/config.py, app/core/crawler_manager.py, tests/test_gcs_archive_info.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/config.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_gcs_archive_info.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_gcs_archive_info.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["exists-yes parsed", "exists-no False", "timeout False + request cleaned", "garbage body -> exists True size/created None"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Decision + local-free helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** _local_data_mtime, _is_confidently_archived (§6), _free_local_crawl_data; archive_crawl cleanup delegates (DRY).

**Files:** app/core/crawler_manager.py, tests/test_archived_guard_decision.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_archived_guard_decision.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_archived_guard_decision.py tests/test_archive_mock_e2e.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["confident only when exists & size>=floor & created_at>=local_mtime", "False on absent/truncated/stale/missing-metadata", "_free_local keeps logs removes data", "archive_crawl unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Wire guard into _auto_stash_one (C3)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** _auto_stash_one consults _is_confidently_archived; confident -> _mark_as_archived + _free_local_crawl_data + skip stash.

**Files:** app/core/crawler_manager.py, tests/test_auto_stash_archived_skip.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_auto_stash_archived_skip.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_auto_stash_archived_skip.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["archived -> mark+free, no stash", "not archived -> stash, no mark", "inflight discarded"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Skip grace clock for archived (C4)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** _record_downloaded_at skips stamping downloaded_at when status=='archived'.

**Files:** app/router/crawler.py, tests/test_record_downloaded_at_guard.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/router/crawler.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_record_downloaded_at_guard.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_record_downloaded_at_guard.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["archived -> no set_json", "finished -> set_json with downloaded_at", "vanished -> no write no raise"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Documentation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document exists-probe markers (tools/CLAUDE.md) + already-archived guard & settings (crawler-service/CLAUDE.md).

**Files:** tools/CLAUDE.md, apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/CLAUDE.md", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "git diff --stat", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tools doc: exists markers + fail-safe", "crawler doc: §6 decision + 2 settings"]}
```
